## Training plots

This dashboard can display the PNG plots generated by the Python analysis/training scripts.

### How to add the plots

1. Generate plots in the project root (Python scripts save to `../plots/`).
2. Copy the PNGs into this folder:
   - `dashboard/public/plots/`

Expected filenames (auto-detected by the dashboard):

- `01_temperature_over_time.png`
- `02_pads_vs_temperature.png`
- `03_distributions.png`
- `04_lstm_predicted_vs_real.png`
